meaning: n.巨洞,洞窟,深处vt.放于山洞中,挖空
examples: Four avenues opened out of the small cavern which the great rock stood in.
The Spot: The Grand Canyon's Redwall Cavern
This cavern knows no philosophers; its dagger has never cut a pen.
Famed more for its setting than its food, Alux is in a cavern full of stalactites.
The walk took in the cliffs from the Devonian era, and the caves at Kents Cavern.
